RAISE_THE_FLAG_ONCE — voice your view clearly once, briefly, without hedging. If the group does not engage, you have done your part. Repeated pushback wastes political capital and signals poor judgment about when to press. Let the decision be made; let the result teach.

RESPOND_WITH_VALUE_FIRST — MD-202: 人脈介紹=用完沉默+回報結果. For a dormant connection reactivating with an opportunity: respond promptly, evaluate the opportunity on its own merits (not because of the relationship), acknowledge the reconnection explicitly, follow up regardless of outcome.
